hazard_source.name: GCT Chemical Complex (Ghannouch)
hazard_source.risk_factor: Primary origin point for toxic air, chemical spill, and water contamination affecting the entire region.

zones.name: Ghannouch Residential Area
zones.risk_factor: Densely populated area with chronic exposure to industrial emissions.

zones.name: Lycée Pilote de Gabès
zones.risk_factor: High concentration of minors; limited self-evacuation capacity.

zones.name: Faculté des Sciences de Gabès
zones.risk_factor: High student density and presence of laboratories.

zones.name: Hôpital Régional de Gabès 'Mohamed Ben Sassi'
zones.risk_factor: Primary hospital with immobile patients; highly vulnerable.

zones.name: Clinique El Amen
zones.risk_factor: Secondary healthcare facility with vulnerable patients.

zones.name: Marché Central de Gabès
zones.risk_factor: Very high civilian density, especially daytime exposure.

zones.name: Port de Commerce de Gabès
zones.risk_factor: Risk of maritime pollution and economic disruption.

zones.name: Oasis de Gabès (Chenini Nahal)
zones.risk_factor: Irreversible ecological damage and food/water security risk.

zones.name: Barrage de l'Oued Gabès
zones.risk_factor: Primary agricultural and supplementary water reservoir contamination risk.

zones.name: Siège du Gouvernorat de Gabès
zones.risk_factor: Critical for coordination of emergency response.

metadata.notes: Priorities are inferred based on population vulnerability, critical infrastructure, and environmental impact.
